description_long: This object is a vintage corded telephone with a rectangular wooden base adorned with ornate brass panels and decorative engravings, including an eagle motif on the front. The top of the base features a rotary dial with black and white number buttons, surrounded by a brass ring. A separate handset, composed of brass and black elements, rests on a cradle supported by two brass arms, with a coiled brown cord connecting the handset to the base. The receiver and mouthpiece are both circular and made of black material, contrasting with the metallic finish of the rest of the handset. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century telephones, combining both functional and decorative elements. The object exudes a sense of historical elegance and craftsmanship, making it a striking feature in any setting.
description: A vintage corded telephone with a wooden base, ornate brass detailing, a rotary dial, and a coiled cord connecting the handset. The design features decorative engravings and a classic cradle for the handset.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate brass eagle engraving, rotary dial, and the handset resting on the cradle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden base and the profile of the rotary dial and handset.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back brass panel, the coiled cord, and the rear structure of the cradle and handset.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the coiled cord's length and the side profile of the handset and dial.
